name: SUBURBAN PROPANE PARTNERS LP
summary: PART I ITEM 1. B USINESS Development of Business Suburban Propane Partners, L.P. (the Partnership), a publicly traded Delaware limited partnership, is a nationwide marketer and distributor of a diverse array of products meeting the energy needs of our customers.
